channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Childish Gambino @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-09 03:00 — Childish Gambino at Chase Center. Childish Gambino's live performances are known for their energy and depth, making this a highly anticipated event.

item.title: Weezer @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-10 02:00 — Weezer at Chase Center. Weezer continues to be a major player in the alt-rock scene, and their upcoming show promises a nostalgic yet fresh experience.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's unique blend of pop and storytelling makes her performance a must-see, especially with her West End show.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims has been gaining traction for his soulful voice and engaging performances, making this tour noteworthy.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's innovative approach to live music and their eclectic sound make this tour a significant event.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 → 2026-12-13 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's rapid rise in the pop world and her emotional performances make her shows highly anticipated.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose. Beck's eclectic style and long-standing reputation for great live shows make this tour exciting.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jon Batiste's dynamic performances and Grammy-winning artistry make this a must-see event.

item.title: Liz Phair @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-10 01:30 — Liz Phair at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Liz Phair and Sleater-Kinney together offer a powerful lineup that appeals to indie rock fans.

item.title: Godsmack @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-09-20 02:00 — Godsmack at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Kishi Bashi's unique sound and engaging performances make his anniversary tour noteworthy.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Hayley Williams' solo show promises to showcase her unique artistry and connection with fans.

item.title: Kruder & Dorfmeister @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-26 03:00 — Kruder & Dorfmeister at Fox Theater - Oakland. Kruder & Dorfmeister's anniversary tour is a significant event for electronic music enthusiasts.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's activism and powerful live shows resonate strongly with fans.

item.title: Kishi Bashi @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-26 03:00 — Kishi Bashi at The Fillmore. Dermot Kennedy's emotive performances and rising popularity make his show a must-see.

item.title: G-Eazy @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — G-Eazy at Shoreline Amphitheatre. $uicideboy$'s unique style and dedicated fanbase make this tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Jack Harlow @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-22 03:00 — Jack Harlow at Fox Theater - Oakland. Snarky Puppy's innovative sound and musicianship make their performance a highlight for jazz fans.

item.title: Billy Strings @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-03 02:30 — Billy Strings at Oakland Arena. Billy Strings' blend of bluegrass and rock has garnered him a passionate following, making this event significant.

item.title: Disney Worlds Collide Concert Tour @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-04 02:00 — Disney Worlds Collide Concert Tour at Chase Center. San Holo's electronic music and engaging performances are set to attract a lively crowd.
